location: Inside a chest hidden in one of the tents on the ground level of Fog Rift Fort, on the opposite side of the fort's central open area from where you enter.

source.name: Chest in a tent, Fog Rift Fort ground level

tactics: Drop down from the cliffs northwest of the Scadu Altus, West Site of Grace onto one of Fog Rift Fort's towers to enter.
The fort is patrolled by Messmer Soldiers with fire pots/flamethrowers on the bridges and ground — clear or sneak past them before looting.

The chest is separate from Black Knight Garrew, the fort's boss found in a stone house across a side bridge — you do NOT need to fight him to get the Serpent Flail, so don't waste time hunting for it near him.
Bring fire resistance or ranged options if you're not confident clearing the flamethrower soldiers in the open ground area.
lore: The flail's coiled snake heads channel Messmerfire, and it was used by Messmer's soldiers as a weapon of terror — searing brands of fire and fear into captured Hornsent rather than just striking them down.

builds.name: Faith/Fire bleed-adjacent flail build
builds.why: Despite its steep Dexterity requirement, it scales best with Faith, and its Flare, O Serpent skill adds a large burst of Fire attack power plus an explosion on strong attacks, making it a strong cheap Fire-damage option for Faith characters.
builds.statFocus: Faith primary, Dexterity secondary (24 Dex / 21 Faith requirement)

builds.name: Quality/Faith hybrid
builds.why: With E/D/D scaling in Strength, Dexterity, and Faith, it can slot into a spread quality-plus-faith build that wants a fire-infused backup weapon without needing heavy Intelligence or Arcane investment.
